subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from the servant of the All-Merciful, Who was named 'Abdu'lláh and became known as Áqá Ján, unto them that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من خادم الرحمن الذی سمی بعبدالله و اشتهر باقا جان الی الذینهم
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @suffering and imprisonment, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @station of the Manifestation of God, @stories; anecdotes, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @chastisement and requital, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @corruption; misinterpretation of the Word of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @oneness or innumerability of the Manifestations of God, @literal interpretation, @rebellion and misdeeds of Mirza Yahya; the Azalis, @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @false claims to divine revelation or spiritual stations, @firmness in the Covenant, @He Whom God Shall Make Manifest; the Bab and Baha'u'llah
